name: chr20_20p11_21_FOXA2_FERMT1
description: 20p11.21 SD belt containing FERMT1 (Kindler syndrome gene), BMP2K, and BTBD3 paralog blocks. Continuous with the 20p11 pericentric SD field and forms part of the proximal 20p SD-dense belt.

architecture.internal_structure: Direct and inverted SDs of 20-80 kb at 93-98% identity flanking FERMT1, BMP2K; embedded in proximal-20p SD-enriched belt; site of occasional NAHR events.
